columns.name: customer
columns.description: Identifier linking the contact to a customer.

columns.name: title
columns.description: Job title of the contact person.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Email address of the contact person.

columns.name: phone
columns.description: Phone number of the contact person.

columns.name: primary
columns.description: Indicates if this is the primary contact for the customer.

columns.name: sms_enabled
columns.description: Indicates if SMS communication is enabled for this contact.

columns.name: department
columns.description: Department to which the contact belongs.

columns.name: address1
columns.description: Primary address line of the contact.

columns.name: address2
columns.description: Secondary address line of the contact.

columns.name: postal_code
columns.description: Postal code of the contact's address.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country code of the contact's address.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the contact was created.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the contact was last updated.
